Name: MessageBoxParam
Description: Determines the configuration for message boxes.

Fields.Name: Category Type
Fields.Description: The message category this message box uses.

Fields.Name: Request Pause
Fields.Description: If ON, this message box will request a pause.

Fields.Name: Singleplayer: Control Type
Fields.Description: The control type to use for this message box.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer: Control Type
Fields.Description: The control type to use for this message box.
